## IMPORTANT — do not include

Do not include any of the following in this report:

- Real BTC amounts or CAD values
- Bitcoin addresses or transaction IDs (txids)
- Any personal financial data or exchange export files

If reproducing the bug requires real transaction data, create a synthetic CSV with
obviously fake values that triggers the same error, and attach that instead.
